creator: parsonsc@orting.wednet.edu
text: Not really a problem. But more of a suggestion. Why do I have to switch between cds during the first install? I mean I remember installing DooM 2 from floppies on DOS and even that asked for the disks in its correct order. I stopped using FreeBSD and went to Ubuntu about 2 years ago, and I want to get back into FreeBSD. I remember having this problem back with the older distributions. Is it something that has to be done? Is it a ploy to get you to buy the DVD? Do you have hidden cameras on us and laugh at us while we sit and change out the cdrom 100 times? I am very confused.
